title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation · Execution Trace: Strong Components
summary: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 strong components increment in a strongly-connected dependency report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compute strongly connected components and validate mutual reachability within each result.
Use discovery and finish structure to reason about directed reachability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
